label: Ritual outcome possibility
description: One weighted outcome entry for a RitualOutcomeEffectDef. Describes a label, mood memory, and occurrence chance.

label.label: Label
label.description: Short display label for this outcome shown in the ritual outcome UI.

description.label: Description
description.description: Longer description explaining what happens when this outcome occurs.

potentialExtraOutcomeDesc.label: Potential extra outcome description
potentialExtraOutcomeDesc.description: Additional description shown as a tooltip hint about possible extra effects.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Relative weight for this outcome. All outcome chances in a def should sum to 1.0.

memory.label: Memory
memory.description: ThoughtDef added to participants when this outcome occurs.

positivityIndex.label: Positivity index
positivityIndex.description: Signed integer indicating how positive this outcome is. Used to rank best and worst outcomes. Negative values are bad outcomes.

roleIdsNotGainingMemory.label: Role IDs not gaining memory
roleIdsNotGainingMemory.description: Role IDs whose assigned pawns do not receive the memory thought for this outcome.

ideoCertaintyOffset.label: Ideo certainty offset
ideoCertaintyOffset.description: Amount added to the ideo certainty of participants when this outcome occurs. Positive values increase certainty.
